product.positioning: Wallet-native acute emergency travel protection for nomads, residents, and longer travel windows.
product.activationCapRule: The exact Travel 30 cap locks only at activation from the posted claims-paying reserve/backstop snapshot, terms hash, waiting periods, exclusions, and quote expiry.

pricing.sponsorPricingNote: Sponsor pricing is negotiated for larger cohorts.

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.trigger: ER or urgent hospital evaluation with same-day discharge

reimbursementTopUp.description: Target aggregate maximum for Founder access. The active reimbursement top-up cap is reserve-indexed and locks only at activation.

coveredWhen: Acute, unplanned, and medically necessary within the cover window.
Sudden acute illness needing ER or inpatient care.
Ambulance tied to the covered acute event.
Emergency imaging, labs, procedures, medications, and hospital fees tied to the covered acute event.
exclusions: pregnancy, maternity, fertility, and neonatal care
preventive care, screening, wellness checks, and standard medication refills
dental, optical, and hearing care unless a later trauma rider is added
evacuation, repatriation, baggage, and trip cancellation
substance-related events, self-harm, fraud, criminal acts, and sanctions-excluded scenarios

claimsTrustModel.phase0: OmegaX Health operator-backed oracle review for the current Phase 0 launch window, with internal operator escalation when needed.
claimsTrustModel.phase1: Next phase: AI claim recommendation with operator override kept internal when needed.
claimsTrustModel.phase2: Roadmap: more explicit claims-operator and governance-visible dispute handling after the bounded launch window.

commercialLayers.appMembership: Separate OmegaX Health app subscription for AI health agent value and premium app features.
commercialLayers.protectionPremium: Founder reservation/access payment holds a place and price for Travel 30. Active protection starts only after activation locks exact cap and terms.

premium.reserveRole: Collected premiums attributed to the Travel 30 protection reserve lane after the relevant activation/posting rules are satisfied.

liquidity.reserveRole: Posted LP and backstop capital that supports Travel 30 obligations.

issuanceControls.reserveAttribution: Only posted capital, collected premiums, and explicit backstop funds count as claims-paying reserve.
issuanceControls.publicStatusRule: Keep Travel 30 positioned as 99 USDC Founder access for the first 100-seat cohort, targeting reserve-indexed benefits up to 250,000 USDC only after posted reserve/backstop proof and final terms support activation. Do not describe it as broadly live insurance today.
issueWhen: Travel 30 reserve lanes have posted claims-paying reserve/backstop that meets the published cap ladder threshold.
Activation quotes lock exact cap, reserve snapshot/hash, terms hash, waiting periods, exclusions, and quote expiry.
Operator-backed claim review is staffed for the active issuance window.
The shared public evidence schema stays aligned with the published metadata document.
pauseWhen: Posted reserve/backstop proof cannot support any published activation cap.
Claims operator or oracle staffing falls below the required phase-0 review readiness.
Schema, pricing, or benefit truth drifts from the published Genesis metadata.
